Rectangular, medium-large wall-mounted picture frame of dark stained wood with a gilt inner lip and carved outer profile, containing a glass-covered sepia sailboat print; frame shows minor corner wear and a small chip at the lower-left and a slight reflective glare on the glass — photographed from about 1.5 m away.
